betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Desulfurized Oil§f

§aSulfur-free petroleum — unlocks the reformate gas processing path in the vacuum refinery!§f

Desulfurized Oils are petroleum products processed through §bHydrodesulfurization§f in the Hydrotreater. They enable an alternative processing path in the §bVacuum Refinery§f that produces §bReformate Gas§f instead of Sour Gas. Two variants exist: §bDesulfurized Crude Oil§f and §bDesulfurized Cracked Oil§f.

§6Production§f:
§b• Hydrotreater§f (Crude Oil): §e1,000mB§f Crude Oil + §e50mB§f Liquid Hydrogen → §e900mB§f Desulfurized Crude Oil + §e150mB§f Sour Gas.
§b• Hydrotreater§f (Cracked Oil): §e1,000mB§f Cracked Oil + §e50mB§f Liquid Hydrogen → §e900mB§f Desulfurized Cracked Oil + §e150mB§f Sour Gas.

§6Vacuum Refinery§f (Desulfurized Crude Oil @ 2 PU):
§b• §e400mB§f Vacuum Heavy Oil
§b• §e250mB§f Reformate
§b• §e200mB§f Vacuum Light Oil
§b• §e150mB§f Reformate Gas (instead of Sour Gas!)

§6Oil Refinery§f (Desulfurized Hot Crude Oil):
§b• §e350mB§f Desulfurized Naphtha
§b• §e300mB§f Heavy Oil
§b• §e200mB§f Desulfurized Light Oil
§b• §e150mB§f Unsaturated Hydrocarbons
§b• Paraffin Wax

§eTip§f: The main reason to desulfurize is to access §bReformate Gas§f from the Vacuum Refinery. Reformate Gas is critical for §bHigh-Performance Solvent§f, §bSaturnite§f, §bCMB§f welding, and §bOsmiridium§f welding — all essential for end-game progression!
